title: PRE 30 Speculation and Theories
wikitext:
[]: PRE 3.0 Speculation and Theories             Quote Post by BigSkeez0195 » Wed May 30, 2018 11:18 am Hey People, Ive been doing a lot of reading of various fanfics and have been interested lately in post 3.0 stories. A lot of them tend to create theories of what happened before the beginning of the third film and im curious what peoples theories are for events that occurred in between the second and third films. The third one left a whole lot of timeline open to speculation so im curious about any interesting ideas people may have. My favorite theory is one i have actually seen in a few different stories is the fact that there were previous versions of Shinjis "created" by NERV and created a lot of problems for WILLE. Which would make sense given every bodies cold reaction when the Shinji we finally see shows up. If this has been discussed in depth previously let me know. I didnt have any luck finding it. I look forward to ideas!

[]: Re: PRE 3.0 Speculation and Theories             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 30, 2018 11:41 am - EGF search for keyword "rebuild" between 2009/6/28 and 2012/11/17 (interim between release dates) . - Same search with "preview" added. You should be able to find the kind of stuff you're looking for pretty easily by scanning for appropriate topic titles in the Rebuild subforum. Here are some of the more obvious ones: thread/6938/Evangelion-30-Speculation-1/ (100 pages!) thread/13324/NO-SPOILERS-Evangelion-30-Speculation-2/ post/438549/Quickening-Eva-08-split/ thread/13414/Shinji-Character-Analysis-20-30/ thread/8241/Shinji-and-Rei-in-Q-30/ thread/13252/Q-Trailers-Thread-was-Q-trailer-on-new-Nico-Nico/ thread/13304/Eva-30-Q-Trailers-Thread-PRE-11-17-ONLY/ thread/8113/Evangelion-Units-in-30/ thread/4325/What-are-the-Adams/ thread/9156/Asuka-incident/

[]: Re: PRE 3.0 Speculation and Theories             Quote Post by BigSkeez0195 » Wed May 30, 2018 1:31 pm Thanks Reichu! Id still be interested in fresh theories people may have! so feel free to let me know what you think [Don't double-post, please. Edit your post instead. -Reichu]

Article: PRE 30 Speculation and Theories
[]: PRE 3.0 Speculation and Theories             Quote Post by BigSkeez0195 » Wed May 30, 2018 11:18 am Hey People, Ive been doing a lot of reading of various fanfics and have been interested lately in post 3.0 stories. A lot of them tend to create theories of what happened before the beginning of the third film and im curious what peoples theories are for events that occurred in between the second and third films. The third one left a whole lot of timeline open to speculation so im curious about any interesting ideas people may have. My favorite theory is one i have actually seen in a few different stories is the fact that there were previous versions of Shinjis "created" by NERV and created a lot of problems for WILLE. Which would make sense given every bodies cold reaction when the Shinji we finally see shows up. If this has been discussed in depth previously let me know. I didnt have any luck finding it. I look forward to ideas!
